use_cases: Call-to-action button for collaboration or contact pages with animated icon feedback
Interactive button that expands on hover to reveal additional space for the icon element
Engaging CTA button with rotating arrow icon that draws attention during hover
ai_summary: A minimalist button component featuring an integrated arrow icon that animates on hover—shifting position, rotating 45 degrees, and expanding the button's padding to create a smooth, interactive call-to-action effect. Built with Tailwind CSS transitions for a polished micro-interaction suitable for any SaaS, e-commerce, or landing page.
